ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comic_books" (
  "comic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comic book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the comic book */,
  "comic_title" TEXT /* Title of the comic book series */,
  "title" TEXT /* Specific title of the comic book (e.g., Filler Bunny) */,
  "issue_number" INTEGER /* Issue number of the comic book */,
  "qty_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the comic book currently in stock */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover image of the comic book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the comic book was published */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the comic book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the comic book (e.g., superhero, horror, sci-fi) */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the comic book (e.g., All Ages, Teen, Mature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comic_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "comic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comic book sold */,
  "account_num" INTEGER /* Account number of the retailer or customer */,
  "qty_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of comic books sold in the transaction */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale occurred */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the comic book sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_comic_id FOREIGN KEY ("comic_id") REFERENCES comic_books ("comic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_account_num FOREIGN KEY ("account_num") REFERENCES accounts ("account_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account (e.g., retailer name) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., retailer, distributor) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the account */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "comic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comic book in inventory */,
  "qty_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the comic book available in inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the last restock occurred */,
  "restock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity restocked in the last restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_comic_id FOREIGN KEY ("comic_id") REFERENCES comic_books ("comic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the given date */,
  "total_qty_sold" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold for the given date */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range of the analysis */,
  "highest_selling_title" TEXT /* Title of the comic book with the highest sales during the period */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated during the period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., sales, inventory) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "average_revenue" REAL /* Average revenue per sale during the period */,
  "most_sold_genre" TEXT /* Genre with the highest sales during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, sales, inventory) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Date and time of the last logout */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
